outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Consumer sentiment declines to another new record low as Americans fret over Iran war
outlets.summary: CNN reports University of Michigan consumer sentiment fell to 48.2 in May — lowest since records began in 1952. One-third of respondents cite gas prices as top concern. Highlights domestic economic toll of Iran war.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Satellite images reveal Iran damaged 228 structures at U.S. bases — far more than acknowledged
outlets.summary: WaPo investigation finds Iranian strikes damaged or destroyed at least 228 structures across US Middle East bases — far higher than Pentagon publicly acknowledged. Underscores extent of Iran's missile/drone reach during the war.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Project Freedom aimed at wrangling control of Hormuz ends after less than 48 hours
outlets.summary: NPR reports on the abrupt end of Project Freedom — the US Navy escort operation in the Strait of Hormuz that lasted less than 48 hours before Trump paused it. Saudi Arabia's refusal to cooperate was a key factor.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Pakistan says it's hopeful a U.S.-Iran deal can happen soon
outlets.summary: Pakistani Foreign Ministry spokesperson Tahir Andrabi: 'We expect an agreement sooner rather than later' on US-Iran deal mediated by Pakistan. NPR notes Pakistan's pivotal role in 14-point MOU negotiations.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump calls US strikes on Iran a 'love tap' after destroyers targeted in Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: Fox covers Trump calling strikes 'just a love tap' and warning of 'one big glow.' Also reports ex-NCTC chief Kent confirming all 18 intel agencies agreed pre-war Iran wasn't developing nukes.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump temporarily halts Project Freedom in Strait of Hormuz, cites progress toward Iran deal
outlets.summary: Fox frames MOU progress as validation of Trump's deal-making. Oil down 7-11%. Emphasizes Trump's threat that 'bombing starts at much higher level' if Iran doesn't agree. White House says gas prices should 'plummet' as Epic Fury ends.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: What we know about Iran's response to the latest US ceasefire proposal
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera analyzes Iran's pending response to 14-point MOU. Key issues: enrichment moratorium length, sanctions timeline, Hormuz reopening sequence. Rubio expects response by Friday. US disabled 2 tankers.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: What are US proposals to end war, and will Iran agree to them?
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera explainer on the 14-point MOU: nuclear moratorium, sanctions relief, Hormuz reopening, 30-day negotiation period. Analyzes whether Iran's demand for Hormuz-first sequencing vs US insistence on nuclear-first can be bridged.

outlets.name: ITV News
outlets.headline: Iran reviews 14-point US peace proposal as Trump praises 'very good' talks
outlets.summary: ITV covers Iran reviewing the 14-point US peace proposal. Trump calls talks 'very good.' Qatar PM says 'high probability' of deal. Markets rally on optimism.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Trump Wants to Cut His Losses and End the Iran War. Israel Can't Stop Him
outlets.summary: Haaretz analysis argues Trump is determined to end the Iran war regardless of Israel's objections. 42% of Likud voters considering switching parties. Security chiefs oppose deal but Israel lacks leverage to block it.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: UAE says it's responding to missiles, drone attacks after US, Iran clash in Hormuz
outlets.summary: ToI liveblog covers UAE intercepting attacks, Hezbollah record 105 attack waves (1 killed in Nahariya), Netanyahu's red lines for Iran deal, and CENTCOM strikes on Qeshm/Bandar Abbas.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: IDF confirms killing commander of Hezbollah's Radwan Force in Beirut strike
outlets.summary: JPost confirms IDF killed Malek Ballout in Beirut's Dahieh suburb — first Israeli strike since April 16 ceasefire. Netanyahu convened security cabinet. IDF says Israel has 'series of targets ready for attack' in Iran.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Iran's President Says He Met Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei Amid Persistent Health Rumors
outlets.summary: Iran International covers Pezeshkian's claim of a 2.5-hour meeting with Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei. First proof of life since March appointment. Notes persistent health rumors and questions about the reclusive leader's actual control.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iranian forces inflict damage on US assets in Strait of Hormuz as Trump's desperation grows
outlets.summary: Press TV claims IRGC Navy 'inflicted significant damage on US naval assets' and forced destroyers to 'flee.' Frames US strikes on tankers as desperation. US denies any assets were struck.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iran activates new Strait of Hormuz transit system as US blockade ends in failure
outlets.summary: Press TV frames PGSA launch as Iranian sovereignty triumph. Claims Project Freedom pause proves US failure. IRGC warns ships outside Iranian corridor face 'decisive action.'
